reasoning: The control CC6.8 focuses on preventing or detecting unauthorized or malicious software. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through several mechanisms: ensuring that container images are scanned for vulnerabilities (k8s_image_vulnerability_scanning_enabled), enforcing security policies at the admission controller level to prevent the deployment of insecure pods (k8s_admission_controller_pod_security_enabled), applying network policies to restrict ingress traffic (k8s_networkpolicy_default_deny_ingress), and configuring pod security contexts to prevent running as root (k8s_pod_security_context_non_root). These controls collectively help in mitigating the risk of introducing malicious software into the Kubernetes environment.
title: CC6.8 The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software to meet the entity’s objectives
